reviews.reason: The DNA cue only repeats the front's explicit genetic-material topic and gives no location information.
The bacterium cue only repeats the front's explicit bacterial context and does not reveal the genetic material's form.
The plant cue only repeats the front's explicit plant-cell context and gives no information about vacuole contents.
The plant cue repeats context already explicit in the front without indicating the cell-wall material.
The generic cell-culture cue does not indicate when animal-cell differentiation occurs or distinguish the options.
The generic cell-culture cue adds no information about the main role of cell division in mature animals.
The generic cell-culture cue does not reveal what a differentiating cell acquires or eliminate any option.
The microscope cue only repeats the front's explicit microscope topic and does not indicate either comparative capability.
